exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1044, 214). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=126.0.6478.114) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [8025ccccf6b60d0a19281a1a19121aa6, clickElement {id=f.ABF734E33A320676A11829C68E39F304.d.66F21D90E45617E5A777F256B25396E2.e.286}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 126.0.6478.114, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 126.0.6478.63 (df799988fdc9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Hello\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57681}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57681/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 126.0.6478.114, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (8025ccccf6b60d0a19281a1a19121aa6)] -> xpath: //button[contains(text(),'Transaction')]] Session ID: 8025ccccf6b60d0a19281a1a19121aa6

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (764, 34). Other element would receive the click:
...
